headline: Edison Wildfire Payout Milestone Puts Valuation And Risk In Focus
summary: Southern California Edison's wildfire recovery compensation program has surpassed 1,000 offers tied to the Eaton Fire. The program has now reached more than $380 million in relief for affected residents and businesses. This milestone reflects ongoing efforts to support communities impacted by the Eaton Fire and address wildfire related liabilities. Edison International (NYSE:EIX), parent of Southern California Edison, is moving through a significant phase of wildfire recovery while its...
